form.formComment: Drawn inside box. Most recent effort finished last over 388m at Gosford beaten 15 lengths (23.21) behind Federal Senor in a Grade 5 on April 7. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn inside box. Most recent effort finished last over 388m at Gosford beaten 15 lengths (23.21) behind Federal Senor in a Grade 5 on April 7. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Closed last campaign finishing fourth at this track over 400m three months ago. Drawn well and will take beating with a clean break.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Closed last campaign finishing fourth at this track over 400m three months ago. Drawn well and will take beating with a clean break.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked approaching the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 23.09 when a 1.5 lengths winner over 400m at this track. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 23.09 when a 1.5 lengths winner over 400m at this track. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the hindquarters entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a 0.8 lengths third over 400m at this track, clocking 23.09. Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a 0.8 lengths third over 400m at this track, clocking 23.09. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.66) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 9 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the turn into the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Gosford (23.72) in a Grade 5, finishing a 21 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looking to others.

Went up with the lids and lost ground at the start.

form.formComment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 6th last start over 525m at Taree Super Track (31.13) beaten 8 lengths, behind Spin Around Blue in Grade 5 on March 4. Not keen this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the first turn, checked off heels, shifted outwards and came together.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th over 400m at Maitland beaten 7 lengths (22.98) behind Super Storm in a Grade 5 on April 6. Well placed and among the chances here.
